articles.title: US Stocks Under Pressure on Monday
articles.expand: US equities fell sharply on Monday, testing their lowest levels of the year as escalating conflict in the Middle East and a resulting surge in energy prices prompted a global shift away from risk assets. The S P 500 and the Nasdaq 100 each declined more than 0.5%, with the Nasdaq 100 at one point down 1%. The United States carried out a strike on I...
articles.ai_headline: Acciones estadounidenses caen bruscamente el lunes debido a conflicto en Medio Oriente: presión bajista sobre USD

articles.title: Ibovespa Slips Below as Middle East Tensions Rattle Markets
articles.expand: The Ibovespa fell 1% toward 187,200 on Monday, tracking global equity losses amid escalating Middle East tensions that raise the risk of a prolonged conflict. The United States launched attacks on Iranian authorities over the weekend, and Iran responded by striking multiple countries in the region. Bank stocks retreated as the jump in energy prices...
articles.ai_headline: Tensión en Medio Oriente sube con ataques de EEUU e Irán: riesgo de conflicto prolongado apoya USD

articles.title: French 6-Month BTF Yields Edge Higher to 2.065% in Latest Auction
articles.expand: Yields on French 6-month BTFs (Bons du Trésor à taux fixe et à intérêts précomptés) inched up at the latest auction, with the rate rising to 2.065% from a previous level of 2.027%. The updated data, released on 02 March 2026, signal a modest increase in short-term borrowing costs for the French government. The move, while incremental, may reflect e...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento de BTF francés a 6 meses sube a 2.065%: presión moderada sobre EUR

articles.title: French 3-Month BTF Yield Edges Higher to 2.03% at Latest Auction
articles.expand: Yields on France’s 3-month Bons du Trésor à taux fixe et intérêts précomptés (BTF) inched higher at the latest auction, with the rate settling at 2.030%. The move marks a slight increase from the previous auction result of 2.008%. The updated data, published on 02 March 2026, signals a modest uptick in short-term funding costs for the French govern...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento BTF francés sube a 2.03% en subasta más reciente: presión sobre EUR

articles.title: French 12-Month BTF Yield Ticks Higher to 2.097% in Latest Auction
articles.expand: The yield on France’s 12-month Bons du Trésor à taux fixe et intérêt précompté (BTF) inched up in the latest auction, rising to 2.097% from the previous level of 2.055%. The updated figure, reflecting the auction results as of 02 March 2026, signals a modest increase in short-term borrowing costs for the French Treasury. While the move is increment...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento BTF francés sube a 2.097% en subasta más reciente: presión neutra en EUR y mixto en USD

articles.title: Brazilian Real Tumbles Amid USD Strength
articles.expand: The Brazilian real has slid beyond 5.2 per US dollar, as a perfect storm of global conflict and rising trade barriers overwhelms the support normally provided by the country’s high interest rates. While the Selic rate remains at a restrictive 15%, domestic confidence has weakened following the February 27 inflation report, which revealed a sharp 0....
articles.ai_headline: Real brasileño cae a 5.2 por USD debido a fortaleza del dólar y debilidad de la confianza doméstica: presión bajista sobre BRL

articles.title: GBP: La política mina a la Libra pero los elementos macroeconómicos la respaldan – OCBC
articles.expand: Los estrategas de OCBC, Sim Moh Siong y Christopher Wong, señalan que los riesgos políticos en el Reino Unido, incluida la derrota del Partido Laborista en las elecciones parciales y el posible desafío al liderazgo, siguen pesando en el sentimiento de la Libra.
articles.ai_headline: Riesgos políticos en Reino Unido pesan sobre GBP pero elementos macroeconómicos ofrecen respaldo: mixto

articles.title: BCE: Deberíamos estar preparados para mover las tasas rápidamente en cualquier dirección – Martin Kocher
articles.expand: El gobernador del Österreichische Nationalbank y miembro del Banco Central Europeo (BCE), Martin Kocher, dijo que el BCE debería estar preparado para mover las tasas de interés rápidamente en cualquier dirección en una entrevista con el Wall Street Journal el lunes.
articles.ai_headline: BCE listo para ajustar tasas en cualquier dirección: señal mixta para EUR

articles.title: ECB’s Kocher: Should be prepared to move rates quickly
articles.expand: Governor of the Österreichische Nationalbank and member of the European Central Bank (ECB), Martin Kocher, said that the ECB should be prepared to move interest rates quickly in either direction in a Wall Street Journal interview on Monday.
articles.ai_headline: Gobernador del BCE sugiere prepararse para ajustes rápidos de tasas: presión neutra en EUR y USD

articles.title: Technology tumbles as financials waver: Today's market insights

Notably, semiconductor giants like Broadcom (AVGO) and Micron (MU) are down 3.43% and 3....

articles.expand: Commerzbank’s Senior Economist Dr. Vincent Stamer argues that the Oil-driven inflation rise will weigh on Euro area GDP this year, trimming growth by more than 0.1 percentage points.

Geopolitical risk dominates, and the coming days may be critical: escalation could lead to a deeper correction, as we suggested in ou...

articles.title: QatarEnergy halts LNG production after military attacks on its facilities
articles.expand: Things are just getting messier by the hour. QatarEnergy is the state-owned integrated energy company of Qatar. And they have just announced a stop to its LNG production and associated products. That follows attacks on its operating facilities in Ras Laffan Industrial City and Mesaieed Industrial City. For some context, Qatar ranks as among the top...
articles.ai_headline: Paro de producción de LNG en Qatar tras ataques a instalaciones: presión bajista sobre AUD

articles.title: Brent: El riesgo de guerra mantiene el enfoque en el alza – Commerzbank
articles.expand: El Economista Jefe de Commerzbank, Dr. Jörg Krämer, señala que el petróleo crudo Brent ha reaccionado solo de manera moderada hasta ahora a la guerra en Oriente Medio y al cierre efectivo del Estrecho de Ormuz, subiendo brevemente por encima de los 80$ antes de retroceder.
articles.ai_headline: Guerra en Oriente Medio mantiene alza en Brent: presión alcista sobre CAD

articles.title: Brent: War risk keeps upside in focus – Commerzbank
articles.expand: Commerzbank’s Chief Economist Dr. Jörg Krämer notes that Brent crude Oil has reacted only moderately so far to the Middle East war and effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz, briefly rising above $80 before easing.
articles.ai_headline: Riesgo de guerra mantiene al alza a Brent: presión bajista sobre CAD

articles.title: Switzerland February manufacturing PMI 47.4 vs 50.0 expected
articles.expand: Prior 48.8 Hopes for a recovery in the Swiss industry were dashed with this being another contractionary reading in February. This marks a 38th straight month that Switzerland's manufacturing sector recorded below the 50-point growth threshold. Of note, production slumped back lower with new orders also softening once again. The details: It reaffir...

articles.title: Spain February manufacturing PMI 50.0 vs 50.1 expected
articles.expand: Prior 49.2 That's a slight improvement to the January estimate, as production levels were seen broadly stable in February. That being said, the order books declined for a third straight month albeit at a slower rate at least. On the price front, Spanish manufacturers saw another steep rise in input prices with the rate of inflation edging up from t...

articles.expand: There's plenty to digest as we get the new week/month underway in trading today. articles.title: WTI soars above 70 despite OPEC+’s “band aid” production hike
articles.expand: On Sunday, the OPEC+ “V8” coalition took a proactive stance by accelerating production hikes to 206,000 bpd starting in April. This move—surpassing the 137,000 bpd initially anticipated—serves as a strategic pivot to buffer a market shaken by the sudden U.S./Israeli strikes on Iran. While the alliance officially points to “market ...

articles.title: Premium Watchlist Recap: Australia CPI (January 2026)

articles.title: Swiss KOF barometer strengthens to 104.2, demand outlook improves
articles.expand: Switzerland’s economic outlook brightened in February as the KOF Economic Barometer rose from 103.3 to 104.2, beating expectations of 103.1. The increase resumes the upward trend seen in recent months after a brief dip in January and leaves the gauge comfortably above its medium-term average of 100. According to KOF, the improvement reinforces a po...
articles.ai_headline: KOF suizo sube a 104.2 superando expectativas: perspectiva alcista para CHF

articles.title: Swiss GDP returns to modest 0.1% qoq growth, domestic demand stabilizes Q4
articles.expand: Switzerland’s economy returned to modest growth in Q1, with GDP expanding 0.1% qoq. While slightly below expectations of 0.2%, the reading marks a rebound from the -0.4% contraction recorded in Q3. According to the State Secretariat for Economic Affairs, performance varied across sectors, with domestic demand providing the main source of support. T...
